nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-ukryta-kamera-zamknieta.png
nodes.description: Marketing/product photograph showing the back (underside) of a black Esperanza ECL102 electronic calculator with the hidden camera compartment closed. The rear casing is plain matte black with two visible screws at the top, a centered manufacturer label reading 'ELECTRONIC CALCULATOR — POWERED BY AG10 1.5V BATTERY — Esperanza ECL102 — Made by ?' along with CE/WEEE/recycling icons and a QR code with serial number 5688. Two rubber feet are visible at the bottom corners. The image emphasizes the discreet, ordinary appearance of the device when the embedded KalkMate camera module is concealed — a key product positioning point (covert AI camera for matura exam assistance disguised as a standard school calculator). Asset is part of the website's public image folder, likely used in landing-page galleries or product showcase sections to demonstrate the closed/stealth state of the hidden camera mechanism.
